title: Explore Membership with RHBA | Raleigh Hills Business Association
description: For new members visit our "JOIN US" tab (Application:) Fill out the membership application, submit and next tab will take you to our Stripe payment portal. New membership is $100. New memberships are prorated throughout the year with renewals due on June 1st of each year.
htmlMain:
For new members visit our “JOIN US” tab (Application:) 

Fill out the membership application, submit and next tab will take you to our Stripe payment portal. New membership is $100. New memberships are prorated throughout the year with renewals due on June 1st of each year.
